title: Bottle Gourd Raita
description: A simple and comforting South Indian-style raita made with finely chopped bottle gourd, creamy curd, and a flavorful tempering of mustard, cumin, curry leaves, and red chillies.
method: Heat oil and prepare the tempering.
Add bottle gourd and cook until soft.
Mix with whisked curd and salt.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
